improvement_hint: Add a canonical_family_friendly_food block; demote the noisy scraped 'Cherry Blossoms in Fukuoka' / 'About Kitakyushu' nav-chrome rows that crowd the items list.
Add a climate_infeasibility_note for tropical-beach queries to Hokkaido; redirect to Okinawa palm-beach canonical or explicitly flag mismatch.
Add canonical_free_attractions block (Meiji Jingu, Yoyogi, Shinjuku Gyoen no-fee dates, observation decks, etc.) filtered by price_band=free; localization to German missing.
Canonical_festivals leads with Okumikawa Hanamatsuri — strong intent hit. Consider boosting the description with village-list and booking-route detail.
Surface dying-pottery anchors (Bizen, Tokoname, Onta, Tsuboya etc.) at the top; current cross_program_advisory is mostly performing arts venues which is not pottery.
Typhoon-aftermath queries need a disruption_advisory pointer (DMO contact + JMA / road-closure pages); raw DMO list does not answer 'are roads open / outdoor sites operating'.
Add a canonical_kusatsu_onsen_ryokan block for Kusatsu-specific properties; current hotels list mixes broad Gunma onsen ryokan without anniversary-plan signal.
Filter spots to Sado island municipalities only; family-band canonical block would strengthen the response.
Add canonical_stroller_accessible_beaches block — current canonical blocks are preservation districts / dark-sky / landmarks, not beach-with-boardwalk / sand-mat access.
For day-trip queries return Osaka↔Nara specific routes (Kintetsu/JR, ~35-45min, Nara/Kintetsu Nara stations) rather than full prefecture overview of all hubs.
Add canonical_accessible_hotels block for Hakone with step-free room flags; accessibility_pointer mentions block exists but it is not returned.
Solid general Fujisan retrieval via search_hybrid. Could elevate canonical climbing-routes / 5th-station / Fujigoko anchor for higher specificity.
Shukubo block fires with Koyasan list; add explicit shojin_ryori / vegan note in canonical to confirm dietary fit.
Add canonical_wheelchair_accessible_temples block listing Kyoto temples with confirmed flat-path / accessible restrooms (e.g. Sanjusangendo, Nishi Honganji).
canonical_festivals hoists Hirosaki cherry blossom festival cleanly; keyword routing worked. Could enrich with Hirosaki-jo specific details (2,600 trees, dates, light-up).
canonical_luxury_ryokan should include Tawaraya, Hiiragiya, Hoshinoya Kyoto explicitly to anchor honeymoon-tier Kyoto ryokan.
Strong content from Takikawa official source — covers history, Sapporo/Takikawa styles. Could add explicit lamb-origin (NZ/Australia import, domestic 北海道羊 share) data point.
canonical_luxury_ryokan fires for Hakone with Gora Kadan, Ginyu, Fuga etc. — strong fit. Mention private-rotenburo flag per property explicitly.
canonical_romantic_destinations fires with Nabekanmuriyama (alternative to Inasayama), Glover Garden evening — matches intent well. Some duplicate Inasayama/ropeway entries could be deduplicated.
canonical_halal_food_destinations is strong with Sapporo Masjid, Halal Gourmet Japan directory, New Chitose prayer rooms. Localization to Malay directive present.
canonical_iconic_illuminations names Nabana no Sato with ~8M LEDs, season Oct-May — direct intent hit. Kansai sakura/koyo blocks are off-topic noise; gate them by query keyword.
Only 4 items returned, dominated by Kanazawa Omicho market — Noto peninsula coverage (Wajima morning market, Notojima aquarium, Tsukumo Bay) is missing. Add canonical_noto_seafood block.
Solid MAFF GI items with Portuguese translations (rakkyo, broccoli, kaki, suika). Add explicit Matsuba crab (松葉ガニ) canonical anchor — directly mentioned in query but not surfaced as a top entry.
canonical_premium_brand_meat surfaces Kagoshima Kurobuta (Berkshire, 300yr, sweet-potato fed) — direct intent hit. Could add historical Satsuma-han breeding detail.
plan_feasibility_check correctly flags 1038km infeasible_distance both legs and surfaces 69.5h total — clear infeasibility signal. Could note that even by air Yakushima/Jomon Sugi is a 2+ day trek.
